controls.title: Policies for information security
controls.description: A set of policies for information security shall be defined, approved by management, published and communicated to employees and relevant external parties.

controls.title: Information security roles and responsibilities
controls.description: All information security responsibilities shall be defined and allocated.

controls.title: Segregation of duties
controls.description: Conflicting duties and conflicting areas of responsibility shall be segregated.

controls.title: Management responsibilities
controls.description: Management shall require all personnel to apply information security in accordance with established policies.

controls.title: Contact with authorities
controls.description: The organization shall establish and maintain contact with relevant authorities.

controls.title: Contact with special interest groups
controls.description: The organization shall establish and maintain contact with special interest groups.

controls.title: Threat intelligence
controls.description: Information relating to information security threats shall be collected and analysed.

controls.title: Information security in project management
controls.description: Information security shall be integrated into project management.

controls.title: Inventory of information and other associated assets
controls.description: An inventory of information and other associated assets shall be developed and maintained.

controls.title: Acceptable use of information and other associated assets
controls.description: Rules for the acceptable use and procedures for handling information shall be identified.

controls.title: Return of assets
controls.description: Personnel and other interested parties shall return all organizational assets upon change or termination.

controls.title: Classification of information
controls.description: Information shall be classified according to the information security needs of the organization.

controls.title: Labelling of information
controls.description: An appropriate set of procedures for information labelling shall be developed.

controls.title: Information transfer
controls.description: Information transfer rules, procedures, or agreements shall be in place.

controls.title: Access control
controls.description: Rules to control physical and logical access to information shall be established.

controls.title: Identity management
controls.description: The full life cycle of identities shall be managed.

controls.title: Authentication information
controls.description: Allocation and management of authentication information shall be controlled.

controls.title: Access rights
controls.description: Access rights shall be provisioned, reviewed, modified and removed.

controls.title: Information security in supplier relationships
controls.description: Processes shall be defined to manage information security risks associated with suppliers.

controls.title: Addressing information security within supplier agreements
controls.description: Relevant information security requirements shall be established with each supplier.

controls.title: Screening
controls.description: Background verification checks on all candidates shall be carried out prior to joining.

controls.title: Terms and conditions of employment
controls.description: Employment contractual agreements shall state the responsibilities for information security.

controls.title: Information security awareness, education and training
controls.description: Personnel shall receive appropriate awareness, education and training.

controls.title: Disciplinary process
controls.description: A disciplinary process shall be formalized and communicated to address information security violations.

controls.title: Responsibilities after termination
controls.description: Information security responsibilities shall remain valid after termination.

controls.title: Physical security perimeters
controls.description: Security perimeters shall be defined and used to protect areas containing information.

controls.title: Physical entry
controls.description: Secure areas shall be protected by appropriate entry controls.

controls.title: Securing offices, rooms and facilities
controls.description: Physical security for offices, rooms and facilities shall be designed and implemented.

controls.title: Physical security monitoring
controls.description: Premises shall be continously monitored for unauthorized physical access.

controls.title: Protecting against physical and environmental threats
controls.description: Protection against physical and environmental threats shall be designed and implemented.

controls.title: User endpoint devices
controls.description: Information stored on, processed by or accessible via user endpoint devices shall be protected.

controls.title: Privileged access rights
controls.description: The allocation and use of privileged access rights shall be restricted and managed.

controls.title: Information access restriction
controls.description: Access to information shall be restricted in accordance with the access control policy.

controls.title: Access to source code
controls.description: Read and write access to source code shall be appropriately managed.

controls.title: Secure authentication
controls.description: Secure authentication technologies and procedures shall be implemented.

controls.title: Capacity management
controls.description: The use of resources shall be monitored and adjusted in line with capacity requirements.

controls.title: Protection against malware
controls.description: Protection against malware shall be implemented and supported by appropriate user awareness.

controls.title: Management of technical vulnerabilities
controls.description: Information about technical vulnerabilities shall be obtained and appropriate measures taken.

controls.title: Configuration management
controls.description: Configurations shall be established, documented, implemented, monitored and reviewed.

controls.title: Information deletion
controls.description: Information stored in information systems shall be deleted when no longer required.

controls.title: Data masking
controls.description: Data masking shall be used in accordance with the organization's access control policy.

controls.title: Data leakage prevention
controls.description: Data leakage prevention measures shall be applied to systems and networks.

controls.title: Information backup
controls.description: Backup copies of information shall be maintained and regularly tested.

controls.title: Redundancy of information processing facilities
controls.description: Information processing facilities shall be implemented with redundancy.

controls.title: Logging
controls.description: Logs that record activities, exceptions, faults and other relevant events shall be produced.

controls.title: Monitoring activities
controls.description: Networks, systems and applications shall be monitored for anomalous behaviour.

controls.title: Clock synchronization
controls.description: The clocks of information processing systems shall be synchronized.

controls.title: Use of privileged utility programs
controls.description: The use of utility programs that can override system and application controls shall be restricted.

controls.title: Installation of software on operational systems
controls.description: Procedures shall be implemented to securely manage software installation.

controls.title: Networks security
controls.description: Networks and network devices shall be secured, managed and controlled.

controls.title: Security of network services
controls.description: Security mechanisms and service levels for network services shall be identified.

controls.title: Segregation of networks
controls.description: Groups of information services, users and information systems shall be segregated.

controls.title: Web filtering
controls.description: Access to external websites shall be managed to reduce exposure to malicious content.

controls.title: Use of cryptography
controls.description: Rules for the effective use of cryptography shall be defined and implemented.

controls.title: Secure development life cycle
controls.description: Rules for the secure development of software and systems shall be established.

controls.title: Application security requirements
controls.description: Information security requirements shall be identified when developing applications.

controls.title: Secure system architecture and engineering principles
controls.description: Principles for engineering secure systems shall be established and applied.

controls.title: Secure coding
controls.description: Secure coding principles shall be applied to software development.

controls.title: Security testing in development and acceptance
controls.description: Security testing processes shall be defined and implemented in the development life cycle.

controls.title: Outsourced development
controls.description: The organization shall direct, monitor and review outsourced system development activities.

controls.title: Separation of development, test and production environments
controls.description: Development, testing and production environments shall be separated and secured.

controls.title: Change management
controls.description: Changes to information processing facilities shall be subject to change management procedures.

controls.title: Test information
controls.description: Test information shall be appropriately selected, protected and managed.

controls.title: Protection of information systems during audit testing
controls.description: Audit tests and activities involving assessment of operational systems shall be planned.
